subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Where airtight covers are fitted, trade waste appliances must be vented with a minimum DN 50 vent.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Outlet ventilation is to be provided by either a—

ol.li: DN 100 riser from a disconnector gully outside a building; or
DN 50 vent from a disconnector gully at the outlet of a non-portable appliance inside a building; or
DN 50 vent from a DN 80 trap riser at the outlet of a portable appliance, inside a building.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Trade waste appliance vents and outlet vents may be combined inside a building.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Ventilation must be provided in accordance with AS/NZS 3500.2.

callout.p: Sizing of trade waste ventilation should take into consideration the expected discharge volumes and cooling requirements of the specific installation.
